title: Centralise DEFAULT_DAEMON_PORT constant
description: 7801 appears in src/cli.ts:1154 and :1260. DRY violation.

context.text: Source (verbatim from 2026-05-16 audit): Audit Section 4: "Centralise port constant (7801 appears twice in cli.ts)"

acceptanceCriteria: Single DEFAULT_DAEMON_PORT constant exported from one module
All callers (cli.ts, packages/engine, SwiftUI) import or reference it
